title: The Pack Of Randomness
description: A pack of Random textures, and smiling creepers!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d269cc8fcea26c1466bb1cd87f308223cfd1b25.png)
This pack changes Minecrafts textures to be more simple and weird. 
____________________________________________________________________________________

There are just too many resourse packs that have work put into them, so I fixed it.

![The creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f34df15a751fbcc928a8794c90580ce304517b75.png)
